name: Ashwater
description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
description_raw: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Attack Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Attack cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机攻击牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Attack cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机攻击牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

name: Beetle Juice
description: Enemy's attacks deal [blue]30%[/blue] less damage for the next [blue]4[/blue] turns.
description_zh: 敌人的攻击在下[blue]4[/blue]个回合中造成的伤害减少[blue]30%[/blue]。
description_raw: Enemy's attacks deal [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less damage {Repeat:plural:next turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.
description_raw_zh: 敌人的攻击在下[blue]{Repeat}[/blue]个回合中造成的伤害减少[blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue]。

name: Blessing of the Forge
description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.
description_zh: 在本场战斗中[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的所有牌。
description_raw: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.
description_raw_zh: 在本场战斗中[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的所有牌。

name: Blood Potion
description: Heal for [green]20%[/green] of your Max HP.
description_raw: Heal for [green]{HealPercent}%[/green] of your Max HP.

name: Bottled Potential
description: Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Draw [blue]5[/blue] cards.
description_zh: 将你的所有牌洗入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。抽[blue]5[/blue]张牌。
description_raw: Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
description_raw_zh: 将你的所有牌洗入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。

name: Clarity Extract
description: Draw [blue]1[/blue] card. At the start of your next [blue]3[/blue] turns, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.
description_zh: 抽[blue]1[/blue]张牌。在你的下[blue]3[/blue]个回合开始时，额外[blue]1[/blue]张牌。
description_raw: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}. At the start of your next {ClarityPower:plural:turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.
description_raw_zh: 抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。在你的下[blue]{ClarityPower}[/blue]个回合开始时，额外[blue]1[/blue]张牌。

name: Colorless Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机无色牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机无色牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

name: Cosmic Concoction
description_zh: 将[blue]3[/blue]张[gold]升级[/gold]的无色牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]升级[/gold]的无色牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。

name: Distilled Chaos
description: Play the top [blue]3[/blue] cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
description_zh: 打出你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部的[blue]3[/blue]张牌。
description_raw: Play the top [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Droplet of Precognition
description: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
description_zh: 选择你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
description_raw: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
description_raw_zh: 选择你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。

name: Duplicator
description: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.
description_zh: 本回合，你打出的下一张牌会额外打出一次。
description_raw: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.
description_raw_zh: 本回合，你打出的下一张牌会额外打出一次。

name: Entropic Brew
description: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.
description_zh: 在所有空药水栏位中获得随机药水。
description_raw: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.
description_raw_zh: 在所有空药水栏位中获得随机药水。

name: Essence of Darkness
description: [gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Dark[/gold] for each of your [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].
description_zh: [gold]生成[/gold]你[gold]充能球栏位[/gold]数量个[gold]黑暗[/gold]充能球。
description_raw: [gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Dark[/gold] for each of your [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].
description_raw_zh: [gold]生成[/gold]你[gold]充能球栏位[/gold]数量个[gold]黑暗[/gold]充能球。

name: Explosive Ampoule
description_zh: 对所有敌人造成[blue]10[/blue]点伤害。
description_raw_zh: 对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。

name: Fairy in a Bottle
description: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to [blue]30%[/blue] of your Max HP.
description_zh: 当你将要死亡时，改为丢弃这瓶药水，然后将你回复到你最大生命值的[blue]30%[/blue]。
description_raw: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to [blue]30%[/blue] of your Max HP.
description_raw_zh: 当你将要死亡时，改为丢弃这瓶药水，然后将你回复到你最大生命值的[blue]30%[/blue]。

name: Flex Potion
description: Gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_zh: 获得[blue]5[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。在你的这个回合结束时，失去[blue]5[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
description_raw: Gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_raw_zh: 获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。在你的这个回合结束时，失去[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。

name: Foul Potion
description:
Deal [blue]12[/blue] damage to EVERYONE.
Can be thrown at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] for [blue]100[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] instead.
description_zh:
对所有人造成[blue]12[/blue]点伤害。
也可以投掷给[gold]商人[/gold]换取[blue]100[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description_raw:
Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to EVERYONE.
Can be thrown at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] for [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] instead.
description_raw_zh:
对所有人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
也可以投掷给[gold]商人[/gold]换取[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

name: Gambler's Brew
description: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.
description_zh: 丢弃任意张牌，然后抽相同数量的牌。
description_raw: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.
description_raw_zh: 丢弃任意张牌，然后抽相同数量的牌。

name: Gigantification Potion
description: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.
description_zh: 你打出的下一张攻击牌将会造成三倍伤害。
description_raw: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.
description_raw_zh: 你打出的下一张攻击牌将会造成三倍伤害。

name: Liquid Memories
description: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] [energy:1] this turn.
description_zh: 将你[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合的[energy:1]费用为[blue]0[/blue]。
description_raw: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
description_raw_zh: 将你[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合的{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}费用为[blue]0[/blue]。

name: Orobic Acid
description: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They're free to play this turn.
description_zh: 往你的[gold]手牌[/gold]中加入一张随机攻击牌、一张随机技能牌和一张随机能力牌。这些牌在本回合免费。
description_raw: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They're free to play this turn.
description_raw_zh: 往你的[gold]手牌[/gold]中加入一张随机攻击牌、一张随机技能牌和一张随机能力牌。这些牌在本回合免费。

name: Potion of Binding
description_zh: 给予所有敌人[blue]1[/blue]层[gold]虚弱[/gold]和[blue]1[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 给予所有敌人[blue]{WeakPower:diff()}[/blue]层[gold]虚弱[/gold]和[blue]{VulnerablePower:diff()}[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]。

name: Powdered Demise
description: Enemy loses [blue]9[/blue] HP at the end of each of its turns.
description_zh: 敌人在自身的每个回合结束时，失去[blue]9[/blue]点生命。
description_raw: Enemy loses [blue]{Demise}[/blue] HP at the end of each of its turns.
description_raw_zh: 敌人在自身的每个回合结束时，失去[blue]{Demise}[/blue]点生命。

name: Power Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Power cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机能力牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Power cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机能力牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

name: Radiant Tincture
description: Gain [energy:1]. Gain an additional [energy:1] at the start of your next [blue]3[/blue] turns.
description_zh: 获得[energy:1]。在你的下[blue]3[/blue]个回合开始时，额外获得[energy:1]。
description_raw: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Gain an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your next [blue]{RadiancePower}[/blue] {RadiancePower:plural:turn|turns}.
description_raw_zh: 获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。在你的下[blue]{RadiancePower}[/blue]个回合开始时，额外获得{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。

name: Shackling Potion
description_zh: 所有敌人在这个回合失去[blue]7[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 所有敌人在这个回合失去[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。

name: Ship in a Bottle
description_zh: 获得[blue]10[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。在下个回合开始时获得[blue]10[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 获得[blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。在下个回合开始时获得[blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。

name: Skill Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Skill cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机技能牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Skill cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw_zh: 从[blue]3[/blue]张随机技能牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。

name: Snecko Oil
description: Draw [blue]7[/blue] cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
description_zh: 抽[blue]7[/blue]张牌。在本回合随机化你[gold]手牌[/gold]中所有牌的耗能。
description_raw: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
description_raw_zh: 抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。在本回合随机化你[gold]手牌[/gold]中所有牌的耗能。

name: Soldier's Stew
description: All cards containing [gold]Strike[/gold] gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Replay[/gold] this combat.
description_zh: 在本场战斗中，所有名字中有“[gold]打击[/gold]”的牌获得[gold]重放[/gold]：[blue]1[/blue]。
description_raw: All cards containing [gold]Strike[/gold] gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Replay[/gold] this combat.
description_raw_zh: 在本场战斗中，所有名字中有“[gold]打击[/gold]”的牌获得[gold]重放[/gold]：[blue]1[/blue]。

name: Speed Potion
description: Gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
description_zh: 获得[blue]5[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。在你的这个回合结束时，失去[blue]5[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
description_raw: Gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
description_raw_zh: 获得[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。在你的这个回合结束时，失去[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。

name: Touch of Insanity
description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is free to play this combat.
description_zh: 选择你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的一张牌，使其在本场战斗可以免费打出。
description_raw: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is free to play this combat.
description_raw_zh: 选择你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的一张牌，使其在本场战斗可以免费打出。
